Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Angeline]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Angeline is the name of one of the dolls Kai addresses.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Angeline is currently with Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Angeline communicates with Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Angeline is a blond doll in a black dress carried by Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Angeline is a doll that communicates with Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Angeline is a doll with straight blond hair and a black dress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Angeline communicates within the depths of Simon's mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Angeline is a character who comments on Denner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Angeline sent a message to Simon to be prepared to run.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Angeline has experience with liars.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Angeline can work through problems with the Wanderer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Angeline was carrying Lilia on her back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Angeline is someone Simon could have chosen to go with.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
